violations.text: Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the 1-door reach-in and the 2-door reach-in refrigerators. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/05/2026
The refrigerator door gaskets on the 1-Door and 2-Door Reach-Ins were observed in poor repair. Refrigerator door gaskets must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2024
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on milk cooler #2. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/01/2025
The refrigerator door gaskets on the 1-Door and 2-Door Reach-Ins were observed in poor repair. Refrigerator door gaskets must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the refrigeration door gaskets and door jambs have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment must be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2025
The refrigerator door gaskets on the 1-Door and 2-Door Reach-Ins were observed in poor repair. Refrigerator door gaskets must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2024

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/21/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the refrigeration door gaskets and door jambs have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment must be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2025

Per PIC, establishment currently does not have available hot water for entire building. Kitchen staff was provided with portable hot water heater for hand sink and staff is boiling water for use in 3-bay sink to wash, rinse, and sanitize dishes and utensils. Establishment is using paper lunch trays for service and any remaining dishes are sent to Mt.Hope High School to be cleaned. Per PIC, boiler is in transit. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2025

The drain system was observed to be leaking for the 3-bay sink in the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Service was called during time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2025
The refrigerator door gaskets on the 1-Door and 2-Door Reach-Ins were observed in poor repair. Refrigerator door gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2024

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 10/21/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the refrigeration door gaskets and door jambs have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment must be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2024

The condensate from the chest freezer refrigeration unit was observed frozen in excess in the machine. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. Corrective Action - Establishment must defrost freezer. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024
The ceiling tiles in the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/23/2024

The door to the outside, located in the front entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2023

The electrical outlet/cord for the Dairy chest cooler 1 and 1 door Delfield refrigerator in the (kitchenarea was not in good repair. No TCS foods were stored in the 1 door Delfield refrigerator at the time of this i nspection. -Equipment shall be maintained in good repair. -Establishment shall not store TCS foods in unit until unit is able to maintain an ambient temperature of 41 degrees F. or below. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2023

Ice buildup observed in the Dairy chest cooler 1. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. -Ice buildup shall be broken down to prevent blockage of cold air flow in unit. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2023

The doors to the outside, located in the main entrance of the building, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 06/29/2023
The electrical outlet and chord from the Dairy chest cooler 1 were not in good repair. -Equipment shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2023

Ice buildup observed in the Dairy chest cooler 1. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. -Ice buildup shall be broken down to prevent potential blockage of cold air flow. New Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2023
